codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature requirements: offering-card, production-block, and discipline-block patterns are present on Services/Work/Approach pages, earned-depth interactions are implemented (structural line/marker reveals), precise geometric detail is present on rule terminals, and responsive behavior at 375px is supported by existing grid/mobile breakpoints. No blocking defects were found.

issues.description: The `.offering-card > .structural-marker` and corresponding hover styles are currently unused because no `.structural-marker` element is rendered inside offering cards in page templates, leaving this interaction path inactive.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill-procedure compliance signaling appears inconsistent: the run is marked as following procedure, but required procedure steps in the design-worker skill were skipped.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: design-worker SKILL.md requires reading `src/content/thesis.md` (step 2) and FetchUrl reference-site study (step 3). The transcript skeleton for workerSessionId d5f88b12-21c7-49d0-b331-14152b13a121 shows `Read` of `src/content/brand.md` but no `Read` of `src/content/thesis.md` and no `FetchUrl` calls; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true.

summary: Reviewed design-system-components at commit ab9b08efcf40f0a166e97beeb96f32e83f4abc54. Feature requirements are met and the review passes with one non-blocking code note and one shared-state observation about skill-procedure compliance tracking.
